inputs.label: Width in Pixels
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal pixel count of the digital image or screen, used to calculate physical width.

inputs.label: Height in Pixels
inputs.businessContext: Vertical pixel count of the digital image or screen, used to calculate physical height.

inputs.label: Pixels Per Inch (PPI)
inputs.businessContext: The image resolution, typically the screen's pixel density, determining the inches per pixel.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output dimensions, ensuring manufacturing or design tolerances.
